all.summary: How to activate In-Place Archive and apply/create retention policies
all.body: Content From the Exchange admin center, find the user who needs In-Place Archive activated. From their user blade, navigate to Others, then find Mailbox Archive. Click Manage mailbox archive and then enable Mailbox archive status. After enabling, open Microsoft Purview from the 365 admin console. Select Solutions from the menu then Data Lifecycle Management. Next, select Exchange (legacy) and confirm the right policies are in place. If you need to create bespoke rules, add a policy then ascribe tags. If you view the Default MRM Policy, you'll get a feel for what kind of Retention tags are possible. With the correct policy in place, head back to Exchange and navigate to the user you're editing. all.title: Eaglesoft Cannot Find Server Error
all.summary: Fix for when a single computer cannot contact the EagleSoft server in a dental office
all.body: Content At a larger dental office recently, we had a single computer that would not connect to the Eaglesoft server no matter what. Even after a complete reinstall, it would always get the error that it can’t connect to the server machine. We contacted Eaglesoft and this is a new problem that they have been recently seeing and appears to be related to a recent .net update. The fix 99% of the time is: Navigate to C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\v4.0.30319\Config If machine.config is missing from here: Find machine.config.default and make a copy of it named machine.config Open Eaglesoft technical reference and update the server name/IP Verify Eaglesoft connects and works after making these changes ---

all.title: Outlook for Mac Crashing
all.body: Content Outlook for Mac Crashing Helpdesk just a note that I'll be adding to the KB. The legacy version of Outlook crashes when it receives a specific encryption email and prompts the user for their credentials. It stalls out because the sending server (metcapbank in this instance) wants credentials on their tenant, not the receiving server. This is because legacy Outlook doesn't support S/MIME. It stays crashed because the last email you selected is the encrypted email. I was lucky enough that there was an update in Outlook that "refreshed" the email selection, but otherwise, you may have to rebuild a profile to get Outlook to work again. ---

all.title: Outlook Index Search Not Cooperating
all.summary: If a user reports their Outlook search isn't working, here's a tip.
all.body: Content The specific case where this was helpful, a PPP user reported Shared Contacts weren't appearing in Outlook via Search. When trying to search, Outlook throws an indexing error. The resolution did not seem to have anything to do with Windows' indexing tools/services. From Outlook, navigate to File Accounting Settings Next, select the account in question and click Change From the Exchange Account Settings window, select More Settings Toggle to Advanced and uncheck Download shared folders This will ensure Outlook doesn't cache as many items and always looks to the server for information. This will prevent the user from finding certain items when in offline mode, but if searching through a large number of Shared Contacts is vital, CRMs exist for this purpose. ---

all.body: Content First, confirm where your machine is getting it's time sync from. Otherwise, when trying to copy and paste the original meeting's information, this will prompt an error message saying that the meeting info you're pasting doesn't match the original data. Step 1) Create meeting as you normally would Step 2) Create separate invites as needed Step 3) In all invites that are not the original, click Don't Host Online from the ribbon Step 4) Copy and paste original meeting information into additional invites Step 5) Send. all.filename: Small Network Setup Best Practices with Unifi.md
all.title: Small Network Setup Best Practices with Unifi
all.summary: A list of best practices when setting up a new Unifi network.
all.body: Content Best practices C22Tech recommends when setting up a new client network: The ISP modem/router should NOT be setup in Bridge Mode. Although requires some extra steps at setup is allows other devices to connect to the ISP modem if necessary and means the Unifi router or ISP modem can be replaced and still get online enough to be reconfigured to work. all.summary: Setting in Unifi to stop a multicast device on the network from slowing flooding the switches and making the network unstable
all.body: Content If a Multicast device is sending out too many packets or the packets it sends are echoing on the network you will see devices have diminished performance including issues like being unable to get an IP address from DHCP. In order to stop this issue you need to limit how many packets this device is allowed to send to the network. On a Unif Switch you'll need to find the port you think is causing the issue or set this limiter on all ports (which may cause other issues). Select the port(s) affected and select the Advanced option. Under this section select Storm Control. Once that box is checked you'll see additional options including Unicast, Multicast, and Broadcast. Set all three of these limiters to 300 pkts/second or less. all.filename: Windows Backup Fail_ Writer's Timeout Expired Between Freeze and Thaw Events.md
all.title: Windows Backup Fail: Writer's Timeout Expired Between Freeze and Thaw Events
all.summary: Registry fix to give Windows Server Backup more time to freeze a machine before starting a backup job.
all.body: Content Increase the timeout time for VSS operations: Click on Start Run. Enter: regedit.exe. Ensure backup of registry is made, before making any changes. Find the following registry entry: HKEY LOCAL MACHINE\Software\Microsoft\Windows: NT\CurrentVersion\SPP\CreateTimeout. If the above path is not found, create it. Right-click SPP New DWORD (32 bit) Value. Name: CreateTimeout. In the Value data field, enter: 1200000. This needs to be a Decimal value. 1200000 equals 20 minutes. Reference URL: https://me.n-able.com/s/article/Error-VSS-error-0x800423f2-The-writer-s-timeout-expired-between-the-Freeze-and-Thaw-events-On-Windows-Server-2008 ---

C22Tech (C22).body: Content Best practices C22Tech recommends when setting up a new client network: The ISP modem/router should NOT be setup in Bridge Mode. Hirewell (HW).title: Hirewell Google Alert
Hirewell (HW).summary: Google Alert that will let us know when Google indexes the phrase "Together, we’ll deliver better hires – and lock in lasting impact". This phrase was being used by fraudulent sites in the past, so we want to be notified if another fraudulent site uses this sentence on their site.
Hirewell (HW).body: Content Steps to find the Hirewell Google Alert: Access Google Alerts: Go to Google Alerts. Third Road (TRM).title: Outlook for Mac Crashing
Third Road (TRM).body: Content Outlook for Mac Crashing Helpdesk just a note that I'll be adding to the KB. The legacy version of Outlook crashes when it receives a specific encryption email and prompts the user for their credentials. It stalls out because the sending server (metcapbank in this instance) wants credentials on their tenant, not the receiving server. This is because legacy Outlook doesn't support S/MIME. It stays crashed because the last email you selected is the encrypted email. I was lucky enough that there was an update in Outlook that "refreshed" the email selection, but otherwise, you may have to rebuild a profile to get Outlook to work again. ---

What finally worked was opening up an Excel, Word, or PP file from within OneDrive and clicking Sign-In from the ribbon prompt, which allowed us to get past the initial opening prompt. Once entered into one of the 3 apps, the rest would stay logged into the correct tenant. ---

ASNR.title: Server Backup Drive Swap
ASNR.summary: When clients need their server backup drives swapped, here's how to do it.
ASNR.body: Content From the client's Host Server, open Windows Server Backup, and verify the backup you're looking for exists. While the Host most likely has the physical drive connected to it, the backup may not be operating here. (For example, ASNR's drives are connected at the Host, but the backup occurs on the File Share. You will need to log into the File Share to see if the backup was successful.) With Windows Server Backup open, find a successful backup and verify the location. You'll need to make sure the drive remains in this location after swap. If the latest backups have failed, check for a reason. Most common: the current drive letter doesn't match the designated backup letter. I.E., current backup drive is connected to D, but your backups are mapped to F. Once you have the data you need...

in-place.filename: Activating In-Place Archive & Applying Retention Policies.md
in-place.title: Activating In-Place Archive & Applying Retention Policies
in-place.summary: How to activate In-Place Archive and apply/create retention policies
in-place.body: Content From the Exchange admin center, find the user who needs In-Place Archive activated. From their user blade, navigate to Others, then find Mailbox Archive. Click Manage mailbox archive and then enable Mailbox archive status. After enabling, open Microsoft Purview from the 365 admin console. Select Solutions from the menu then Data Lifecycle Management. Next, select Exchange (legacy) and confirm the right policies are in place. If you need to create bespoke rules, add a policy then ascribe tags. If you view the Default MRM Policy, you'll get a feel for what kind of Retention tags are possible. With the correct policy in place, head back to Exchange and navigate to the user you're editing. From the user blade, select Mailbox then find Retention policy and click Manage mailbox policies....

Apple Business Essentials.title: Apple Business Manager (ABM) Recommendations
Apple Business Essentials.summary: C22's recommendations for how to use ABM
Apple Business Essentials.body: Content Apple Business Manager allows ownership and management of Apple devices (Macs and iOS devices) but has a number of different options that must be managed to enable the correct set of controls. All ABM company implementations fall into one of three categories: 1) Physical Ownership Only - Machines are purchased through Apple and automatically added to ABM but the iCloud account the user associates with the machine during setup is NOT under the direct control of the company. This means the company has inventory info on the machine and can prove to Apple that they are the rightful owner of the machine but they CAN'T move the iCloud account from the machine without the password that only the user knows. 2) iCloud Ownership - The company uses an iCloud account that they control on a mac...

image runner.filename: Canon iR-ADV Copiers_ Update SMTP port when unable to in the interface.md
image runner.title: Canon iR-ADV Copiers: Update SMTP port when unable to in the interface
image runner.summary: Instructions to update the SMTP port for Scan to Email usage with HVE accounts for older Canon iR-ADV Copiers.
image runner.body: Content The SMTP port for Scan to Email cannot be changed in the interface on some older iR-ADV devices and will default to 25 which cannot be used with HVE. To update the port to 587: You need to get into the service mode on the copier. Press the Settings/Registration, quickly followed by 2 & 8 simultaneously, then Settings/Registration again. Choose Mode list Choose copier Choose option Choose Network Press . It should change to Change the value on SMTPTXPN from 25 to 587. ---

citrix.title: Citrix write and save errors.
citrix.summary: For users experiencing a 0x5 or write/save error while working with Citrix applications (Thompson Reuters Virtual machine), specifically when saving to a network drive.
citrix.body: Content Error: Windows cannot access \\Client\C$ You do not have permission to access \\Client\C$ - when saving a file to a local drive in Hosting When attempting to open a file or save a file to a local or network drive from a hosted application, you may receive this error: Windows cannot access \\Client\C$. You do not have permission to access \\Client\C$. Contact your network administrator to request access. For more information about permissions, see Windows Help and Support. You may also receive a 0x5 error. You do not have right to save files to the folder at [folder location]. The import has been canceled. To resolve this issue, either select a different folder or request write permissions from your system administrator. This error can also occur when using ImportOmatic. Answer: To...

VPN.title: Configure Windows VPN Client
VPN.summary: General instructions for configuring VPN settings on Windows.
VPN.body: Content None of our client use the WIndows VPN anymore. We use WireGuard at most clients through Unifi Open Network and Sharing Center Set up a new connection or network Connect to a workplace Use my Internet connection (VPN) Internet Address: vpn"client".c22tech.com "client is the client specific address" Destination name: "Client" VPN Check: 'Remember my credentials' and 'Allow other people to use this connection' Network Connections: Right-click "Client" VPN | Properties Security Tab - Type of VPN: SSTP Allow these protocols - CHAP and MS-CHAP v2 Network Tab - IPv4 Properties | Advanced | Uncheck "Use default gateway on remote network | Click OK

Company Branding.body: Content In order to use branding on the Microsoft Login page we need to provide a image that is a grid view of the client logo. To create this file first get a copy of the client logo from their website (usually you can right-click Save Image as File). Once you have the PNG image of their logo go to the following website. Login for this site is in LastPass for a Premium version through 10/25: https://onlinepngtools.com/ And scroll down to select the option for Clone a PNG. That will take you to the following page on the site: https://onlinepngtools.com/clone-png On the left box select Click to load an image and upload the image you just downloaded. dns.filename: Creating CNAME records for Comhar clients using Foleon.md
dns.title: Creating CNAME records for Comhar clients using Foleon
dns.summary: When Comhar Partners / Keyhires reaches out about setting up a CNAME record for their client(s) to point to Foleon.com, follow these steps.
dns.body: Content The new client needs to login to their DNS registrar (C22 does not want credentials for this). Generally found under "DNS settings," we need to create a new CNAME record that points the subdomain (usually presentation) to s1.foleon.com Can apply the shortest TTL setting available. Comhar in charge of the rest via Foleon (e.g., domain creation). ---

avigilon.filename: Creating Users in Avigilon Alta Open (Door access platform).md
avigilon.title: Creating Users in Avigilon Alta Open (Door access platform)
avigilon.summary: How to create a new user in Alta Open, Avigilon's door access platform. Instructions are specifically for Vartega.
avigilon.body: Content 1) Sign into Avigilon via admin credentials (choose correct client in LastPass) 2) In the left-most pane, select USERS 3) On the far right of the screen, select the PLUS (+) sign 4) Enter email, phone number, and start date (usually start time is 8:00 AM Mountain Time) 5) Once saved, select the ACCESS tab and make sure USER ACCESS is selected next to VARTEGA PECOS 6) Dropdown VARTEGA PECOS and make sure the user's correct access is toggled 7) Select the CREDENTIALS tab and add MOBILE a. We SEND mobile credentials during onboarding call This is SOP for creating users in Alta Open for Vartega. Same principles can be applied to other clients. ---

users.body: Content 1) Sign into Log Me In Central 2) Navigate to Users in the left-hand pane and click Manage 3) Select Add User, enter their E-mail address, and assign correct Group 4) Scroll down to Group/Computer permission and select the "Specify..." option 5) Assign computers the user can access 6) Scroll down to 2-Factor and enable 7) Send invite ---

creation.body: Content 1) Sign into Avigilon via admin credentials (choose correct client in LastPass) 2) In the left-most pane, select USERS 3) On the far right of the screen, select the PLUS (+) sign 4) Enter email, phone number, and start date (usually start time is 8:00 AM Mountain Time) 5) Once saved, select the ACCESS tab and make sure USER ACCESS is selected next to VARTEGA PECOS 6) Dropdown VARTEGA PECOS and make sure the user's correct access is toggled 7) Select the CREDENTIALS tab and add MOBILE a. We SEND mobile credentials during onboarding call This is SOP for creating users in Alta Open for Vartega. Same principles can be applied to other clients. ---

Dental.title: Eaglesoft Cannot Find Server Error
Dental.summary: Fix for when a single computer cannot contact the EagleSoft server in a dental office
Dental.body: Content At a larger dental office recently, we had a single computer that would not connect to the Eaglesoft server no matter what. Even after a complete reinstall, it would always get the error that it can’t connect to the server machine. We contacted Eaglesoft and this is a new problem that they have been recently seeing and appears to be related to a recent .net update. The fix 99% of the time is: Navigate to C:\Windows\Microsoft.NET\Framework\v4.0.30319\Config If machine.config is missing from here: Find machine.config.default and make a copy of it named machine.config Open Eaglesoft technical reference and update the server name/IP Verify Eaglesoft connects and works after making these changes ---

ero.title: Eero Network Management
ero.summary: How to setup a new network when a client purchases an Eero mesh network for their home or business.
ero.body: Content The eero network tools require a user to setup an account to manage their specific network. This account should be setup before the network setup begins and goes in this order: The client creates an eero account at https://account.eero.com . Preferably, this should NOT be their Amazon account in case we need to rebuild it or they need to give us direct access. Once the user has an eero account, they should setup the new network in their account After setting up the network, they should press the Plus button in the upper right of their screen (on the app) and select Add a network admin. They should then select "Share Invite Link" and send it to the helpdesk@c22tech.com address. Once the email is found in the helpdesk inbox we should add it to the eero account found in LastPass. ---

Quickbooks.title: Quickbooks Database Manager and Troubleshooting
Quickbooks.summary: How QuickBooks Database Manager works and how to troubleshoot issues including restarting it.
Quickbooks.body: Content Quickbooks Database Manager is an app on the Quickbooks server that allows multi-user mode in Quickbooks files. Most Quickbooks errors stem from this app. It has to be not only running, but a scan must be completed while it is running to "put" files in it. You have to stay logged in with it scanned and running for it to stay up. If you log out, it will stop. You can tell the app is running if the app window is up on the desktop or in the system tray. If it is not, run the app and hit "start scan" at the bottom of the app window. Only minimize, do not close. OWA.title: Exchange Online - Mailbox Size Limits
OWA.summary: Description of how the Exchange Online mailbox limits work and how to fix them.
OWA.body: Content Exchange Online Mailboxes have limits bases on their license. 50G is the norm is most licenses. 100Gthe is the max with Exchange Online Plan 2. The Archive folder is a part of the mailboxes folder tree and counts against the mailboxes size. The In-Place Archive is a cloud space folder that does not count against the overall size of the mailbox, but the emails do not show up in search. This must be turned on in the Exchange Admin Console per mailbox. Exchange Online limits - Service Descriptions | Microsoft Learn ---

sharepoint.title: File Share Migration: On-Prem > SharePoint
sharepoint.summary: When a client has an on-prem file share and wants to transition to SharePoint.
sharepoint.body: Content From client's M365 tenant, setup SharePoint sites based on the locations you are planning to migrate. I.E., if you are moving a folder called, "Bungie Jumping Experts," create an SPO site with the same name. Add C22Admin as Owners and Members. Once your sites are in place, navigate to Setup and open Migrations. Install an Agent on the File Share (follow M365 Wizard). You will then setup Scans. Let this run. After resolving errors, you will Copy to Migrations. Download the template for a bulk upload. Edit the .CSV as follows: The file share path most likely doesn't need to be edited, but make sure it looks good. Your Destination URL is the site in full -- ex: https://c22tech.sharepoint.com/sites/Example Destination library name can be Documents Destination folder name depends on the...

sharepoint.title: SharePoint Sub Domain Rename
sharepoint.summary: How to change SPO sub domain within M365 tenant.
sharepoint.body: Content 1) Download SPO Management Shell Download SharePoint Online Management Shell from Official Microsoft Download Center 2) Run following script Connect-SPOService -url https://c22az-admin.sharepoint.com -credential user@domain.com 3) Once connected, run next script Start-SPOTTenantRename -DomainName -ScheduledDateTime [-WhatIf] [-Confirm] Domain name = sub domain Time must be 24 hours in future Follow prompts in powershell. If successful, tenant name should be changed. ---

server.title: Server Backup Drive Swap
server.summary: When clients need their server backup drives swapped, here's how to do it.
server.body: Content From the client's Host Server, open Windows Server Backup, and verify the backup you're looking for exists. While the Host most likely has the physical drive connected to it, the backup may not be operating here. (For example, ASNR's drives are connected at the Host, but the backup occurs on the File Share. You will need to log into the File Share to see if the backup was successful.) With Windows Server Backup open, find a successful backup and verify the location. You'll need to make sure the drive remains in this location after swap. If the latest backups have failed, check for a reason. Most common: the current drive letter doesn't match the designated backup letter. I.E., current backup drive is connected to D, but your backups are mapped to F. Once you have the data you need...

While OneNote has all the info you need to get the printer connected to a user's device, here's a more detailed description on how to configure the job codes and (if requested) locked print features. Please note each scenario needs to be saved as a PRESET otherwise the user will need to configure each time they print. Job Codes This is how FBC tracks how much a department is printing. To configure it, you'll need to check the printer options at the time of print. (Without a job code, print job will not complete.) 1. Open a test document and select, "Print" 2. Excel.filename: ForeFront Drive Mapping for Excel Docs.md
Excel.title: ForeFront Drive Mapping for Excel Docs
Excel.summary: The ForeFront Ops Excel documents need a Y drive mapping to work. This is the command to map it.
Excel.body: Content The ForeFront Excel ops documents ofter reference each other with a hard coded value of Y: in the formulas in Excel. In order t make it work you need to set that Y drive to point to a folder on the local machine that references the location of the files in the local OneDrive cache. To start this process open a command line prompt. You can click on Run within the Windows menu, then type cmd to open a command prompt. In most cases, you should NOT need this to be an admin level command prompt although it will work with admin enabled. It is recommended that you first check what Y is currently mapped to with the following command: net use Confirm that the mapped folder is to this local machine (//localhost/) to make sure you aren't breaking a link to a different app's mapping. Assuming...

FPC.title: ForeFront Teams Call Queue
FPC.summary: Call Queue for ForeFront's phone lines through Teams.
FPC.body: Content ForeFront uses Microsoft Teams as their phone line provider. They have requested the Call Queue to be set up as follows: Caller calls in during business hours is routed to their designated receptionist. If Receptionist is not available, rings to everyone in the office (Who is Teams calling enabled). If no one answers, caller leaves voicemail Voicemail is stored on a Shared Mailbox "ForeFront Voicemail" (forefrontvoicemail@forefrontscs.com). Caller calls in before business hours (7:00am - 8:15am) Caller has the option to press 1 for deliveries, or 2 to leave a voicemail. Caller calls after hours: Caller is connected to voicemail. If you just want to know what you need to do, follow this. Has FPC replaced their Office Admin/Receptionist? Update the "Reception" security group to remov...

Google Alerts.title: Google Alerts for C22
Google Alerts.summary: Breakdown of Google Alerts set up for C22
Google Alerts.body: Content Steps to Create a Google Alert: Access Google Alerts: Go to Google Alerts. Sign In: Ensure you are signed into c22tech@gmail.com Create a New Alert: In the "Create an alert about..." box, enter the exact text you want to monitor. To ensure that Google searches for this exact phrase, enclose it in quotation marks. For example: "your exact text here" Customize Alert Settings: Click on “Show options” to customize: How often: Choose how often you want to receive alerts (e.g., "As-it-happens", "At most once a day", or "At most once a week"). Sources: Select the sources you want to monitor (e.g., News, Blogs, Web). Language: Choose the language relevant to your needs. Region: Specify a region if necessary. How many: Select “All results” to capture every instance or “Only the best results...

Gsuite.title: Google Workspace External Sender
Gsuite.summary: Appending [External] or [EXT] to the subject line of emails within Google Workspace tenants
Gsuite.body: Content Appending the subject line in Google Workspace can be achieved by using a Content Compliance policy. Sign into the Workspace Admin Console and navigate to Apps Google Workspace Gmail Compliance Add a Content Compliance rule Use "Inbound" for email messages to affect if you want to affect all inbound emails from an external source. This does not affect inbound emails from an internal source. Configure the following Expressions Full Headers Set to Advanced Content Match Location: Full headers Match type: Not contains text Content: X-Ext:External (note: this relates to the custom header we will be applying in step 3) Subject Set to Advanced Content Match Location: Subject Match type: Not contains text Content: [External] Modify Message Check "Add custom headers" First field input: Ext...

365 HVE 365 scanner scan-to-email.title: High Volume Email (HVE) Setup in 365
365 HVE 365 scanner scan-to-email.summary: Instructions and settings to setup HVE for scan to email for client scanners and other devices.
365 HVE 365 scanner scan-to-email.body: Content C22 uses HVE to allow scan-to-email functionality and other SMTP authenticated email send cases. HVE creates a special account that is allowed to use simple SMTP authentication but does not have other access to the tenant resources and can only send emails to email domains within the same tenant. This means Scan to Email can only allow the scanner to send emails to users internal to the company, not directly out to external recipients. To start the HVE setup, first make sure billing is configured. Follow Microsoft's step-by-step procedure here: Configure Pay-As-You-Go Billing in the Billing Node | Microsoft Learn Next, from Exchange admin center, create the HVE account (Exchange Mail Flow High Volume Email) Store username and random-generated password in client LP. Make sure this n...

PPP.filename: How to Add PPP Events Calendar for Requested Users.md
PPP.title: How to Add PPP Events Calendar for Requested Users
PPP.summary: PPP Events is a Shared Mailbox account within the PPP 365 tenant. Here's how to make sure employees can see it in their Outlook.
PPP.body: Content C22 has access to the Shared Mailbox, events@pppllc.com. By opening Outlook from the PPP 365 tenant, open events@ via the Open Another Mailbox option (top right, click profile badge). Within the events@ mailbox, you can select Calendar from the left pane and using the ellipses (three dots) next to, My Calendar, review Sharing and Permissions. You should see that the group, "Everyone in the organization," has access along with several important PPP users who have mailbox access as well. By granting yourself temporary delegate mailbox permissions to users needing access to the events@ calendar, you can open their mailboxes, navigate to the calendar tab, and Add Calendar from Directory. When you type in events@, it should seamlessly integrate. ---

PPP.title: InTapp Chrome ext not working
PPP.body: Content Troubleshootin' If a user says they are unable to sign into the dedicated browser extension, follow the steps below. From within Chrome, please enter: chrome://extensions/ in the search bar and locate the DealCloud extension on your Extensions page. Then click Details. On the Details page, scroll down until you find Extension options and click the square with the arrow pointing to the upper right. The user's DealCloud settings should be set to DealCloud for Legal under Application and United States under Environment. If it is not, please set the options to match the below image and click save. Then close/relaunch Chrome and try to sign in again from the extension. ---

PPP.summary: If a conference room has an MTR windows device, this is how you get the device in LMI and fix PPP branding.
PPP.body: Content Turn off Windows IoT machine Upon reboot, smash F2 (if Lenovo ThinkSmart) until BIOS appears Select Troubleshoot, Reset this PC, Remove all files, Cloud Download If this doesn’t work, try again. unifi.title: ICMP Traffic Setup in UniFi
unifi.summary: Tips on how to setup ICMP allow traffic rules in UniFi.
unifi.body: Content Potential use case: If an ISP asks to communicate with a client's network, we need to setup rules to allow ICMP traffic. Login to UniFi Site Manager Navigate to client page Open Settings Policy Engine Traffic & Firewall Rules Create Entry Provide the following details: Rule Type: Advanced Type: Internet Local Name: Allow-ICMP-ISP-Monitoring-NA Replace ISP with specific name Action: Accept Protocol: ICMP Source Type: List Source: Create network list (Add new) Port: Any Mac Address: None Destination type: IP address Grab the router IP Port: Blank Match State: Uncheck Match IPsec: Do not match Logging: Check Save. ---

teams.filename: Sending Same Teams Invite to Multiple (Separate) Parties.md
teams.title: Sending Same Teams Invite to Multiple (Separate) Parties
teams.summary: When a user needs emails to remain anonymous among groups but wants everyone to join the same Teams meeting, you'll need to follow the steps below.
teams.body: Content When creating a Teams meeting in Outlook, if you wish to create a calendar invite yet send the same link to separate parties, you'll need to do a small workaround. Otherwise, when trying to copy and paste the original meeting's information, this will prompt an error message saying that the meeting info you're pasting doesn't match the original data. Step 1) Create meeting as you normally would Step 2) Create separate invites as needed Step 3) In all invites that are not the original, click Don't Host Online from the ribbon Step 4) Copy and paste original meeting information into additional invites Step 5) Send. No error message should prompt. You may need to set the Location. ---

index.title: Outlook Index Search Not Cooperating
index.summary: If a user reports their Outlook search isn't working, here's a tip.
index.body: Content The specific case where this was helpful, a PPP user reported Shared Contacts weren't appearing in Outlook via Search. When trying to search, Outlook throws an indexing error. The resolution did not seem to have anything to do with Windows' indexing tools/services. From Outlook, navigate to File Accounting Settings Next, select the account in question and click Change From the Exchange Account Settings window, select More Settings Toggle to Advanced and uncheck Download shared folders This will ensure Outlook doesn't cache as many items and always looks to the server for information. This will prevent the user from finding certain items when in offline mode, but if searching through a large number of Shared Contacts is vital, CRMs exist for this purpose. ---

PWM ipads.summary: PWM iPads not connecting to mconsent
PWM ipads.body: Content PWM's reception uses 2 non ABM iPads to check in patients. They use mConsent which is an app installed on the iPads and the server. If anyone reaches out to us saying the iPads are not connecting, follow the steps below: 1) login to the dental clinic server and locate the mconsent app by searching for it and running as administrator. 2) locate the Apache service within mconsent and manually stop/restart the service. 3) there will be no indication that the service is running again, you will need to confirm with reception if the iPads are working again, if they are still not working, you can ask reception to power cycle the iPads, but if that does not work, someone likely needs to go onsite and take a closer look as the iPads may need to be pushed to the server by re-entering the ip...

QBooks.title: Quickbooks Database Manager and Troubleshooting
QBooks.summary: How QuickBooks Database Manager works and how to troubleshoot issues including restarting it.
QBooks.body: Content Quickbooks Database Manager is an app on the Quickbooks server that allows multi-user mode in Quickbooks files. Most Quickbooks errors stem from this app. It has to be not only running, but a scan must be completed while it is running to "put" files in it. You have to stay logged in with it scanned and running for it to stay up. If you log out, it will stop. You can tell the app is running if the app window is up on the desktop or in the system tray. If it is not, run the app and hit "start scan" at the bottom of the app window. Only minimize, do not close. When restarting the QuickBooks Database Manager for EZ Accounting or other clients run the following steps: Go to the Server that hosts the QBDM and login with the user that we use to run it. teams resource.filename: Removing Delegate Access From Teams Room Resource.md
teams resource.title: Removing Delegate Access From Teams Room Resource
teams resource.summary: How to remove user access from a Teams Room Resource, i.e., PPP employee no longer needs inbox/calendar access to a conference room.
teams resource.body: Content With any client employing the use of Teams Rooms, there are conference rooms created as Teams Resources. In the 365 Admin Console you will find a User object with a Teams Room license. In the Teams Admin Console, you will find User objects as well. To manage delegate access of these conference rooms, open Microsoft Exchange, navigate to Recipients, then Resources. You will most likely find the Teams Resource you are trying to modify. From the blade, click Delegation and check permissions. ---

invites.summary: When a user needs emails to remain anonymous among groups but wants everyone to join the same Teams meeting, you'll need to follow the steps below.
invites.body: Content When creating a Teams meeting in Outlook, if you wish to create a calendar invite yet send the same link to separate parties, you'll need to do a small workaround. Otherwise, when trying to copy and paste the original meeting's information, this will prompt an error message saying that the meeting info you're pasting doesn't match the original data. Step 1) Create meeting as you normally would Step 2) Create separate invites as needed Step 3) In all invites that are not the original, click Don't Host Online from the ribbon Step 4) Copy and paste original meeting information into additional invites Step 5) Send. No error message should prompt. You may need to set the Location. ---

work and school.filename: Separating Microsoft Work_School Accounts from Personal.md
work and school.title: Separating Microsoft Work/School Accounts from Personal
work and school.summary: When a user is trying to sign in with their Microsoft account and are being asked to sign into Work/School or Personal with the same email, here's how to sever that union.
work and school.body: Content 1) Sign into the personal account via login.live.com a. If the password isn't working, use the link to RESET PASSWORD and follow prompts for account access 2) Once inside personal account, navigate to Account Info and setup a new primary email a. Needs to be another personal email or create an Outlook.com address 3) Once the new email is set to primary (which can take 48 hours to reflect), the user should no longer be prompted with choosing between Work/School or Personal accounts when logging into work-related Microsoft websites (i.e. portal.office.com) ---

backups.title: Server Backup Drive Swap
backups.summary: When clients need their server backup drives swapped, here's how to do it.
backups.body: Content From the client's Host Server, open Windows Server Backup, and verify the backup you're looking for exists. While the Host most likely has the physical drive connected to it, the backup may not be operating here. (For example, ASNR's drives are connected at the Host, but the backup occurs on the File Share. You will need to log into the File Share to see if the backup was successful.) With Windows Server Backup open, find a successful backup and verify the location. You'll need to make sure the drive remains in this location after swap. If the latest backups have failed, check for a reason. Most common: the current drive letter doesn't match the designated backup letter. I.E., current backup drive is connected to D, but your backups are mapped to F. Once you have the data you need...

timeserver NTP NTS.filename: Set Time Servers for Windows Machines.md
timeserver NTP NTS.title: Set Time Servers for Windows Machines
timeserver NTP NTS.summary: Script and commands to manually set the NTP servers for Windows machines (Clients and Servers).
timeserver NTP NTS.body: Content The following command lines will set the NTP time servers for a Windows machine (client or server). You can run these commands by hand or download a zip file with these commands as a CMD file from the setup website at www.c22tech.com/setup net stop w32time w32tm /config /syncfromflags:manual /manualpeerlist:"0.it.pool.ntp.org 1.it.pool.ntp.org 2.it.pool.ntp.org 3.it.pool.ntp.org" net start w32time w32tm /config /update w32tm /resync /rediscover ---

SharePoint.title: SharePoint Online Storage Issues
SharePoint.summary: How to gain or clear space when SharePoint hits storage limits.
SharePoint.body: Content You can buy additional storage called 365 Extra Storage at $.20/GB per month. Check Recycle Bins of each site and then delete again from secondary recycle bin for the storage to free up. Simply deleting from Recycle Bin will not clear out space. ---

tenant.title: SharePoint Sub Domain Rename
tenant.summary: How to change SPO sub domain within M365 tenant.
tenant.body: Content 1) Download SPO Management Shell Download SharePoint Online Management Shell from Official Microsoft Download Center 2) Run following script Connect-SPOService -url https://c22az-admin.sharepoint.com -credential user@domain.com 3) Once connected, run next script Start-SPOTTenantRename -DomainName -ScheduledDateTime [-WhatIf] [-Confirm] Domain name = sub domain Time must be 24 hours in future Follow prompts in powershell. If successful, tenant name should be changed. ---

Geofencing. ppp.body: Content Geofencing policy is generally turned on for all countries outside of the US for all users. Policy Creation: Go to Entra, Protection, Conditional Access, Policies. The specific policy should be labelled Geofencing for any policy changes in the settings. This policy is exempted from certain security groups. You do not need to edit within the specific Conditional Access policy. Policy Maintenance: To add an exemption depending on the use case, there should be a security groups labelled Geofencing Exemption Temporary Travel, International Users, and External. Dante.filename: Stop Network Storm from Multicast Source.md
Dante.title: Stop Network Storm from Multicast Source
Dante.summary: Setting in Unifi to stop a multicast device on the network from slowing flooding the switches and making the network unstable
Dante.body: Content If a Multicast device is sending out too many packets or the packets it sends are echoing on the network you will see devices have diminished performance including issues like being unable to get an IP address from DHCP. In order to stop this issue you need to limit how many packets this device is allowed to send to the network. On a Unif Switch you'll need to find the port you think is causing the issue or set this limiter on all ports (which may cause other issues). Select the port(s) affected and select the Advanced option. Under this section select Storm Control. Once that box is checked you'll see additional options including Unicast, Multicast, and Broadcast. Set all three of these limiters to 300 pkts/second or less. This should stop the storm and stablize the network. If sp...

Kyocera.summary: Superior red Kyocera printer install notes
Kyocera.body: Content INSTALL NOTES You must add the 192.168.1.103 port with the following configuration after installing the universal driver. The Kyocera installer will not see the printer on the network but it can be connected with the port by ensuring that the SNMP Status is enabled and the community name is set to: printer and the SNMP device index is set to: 1 The OneNote has a screenshot of the settings Kyocera TASKalfa 4003i IP: 192.168.1.103 Service : 77459 ---

Phones.title: Teams Phones Resource Accounts
Phones.summary: Unique **problems** with Teams Phones Resource Accounts
Phones.body: Content Teams Phone Resource Accounts are required for various functions. They act as the account holding a license and a phone number for voice apps like Auto Attendants and Call Queues. To set up a Teams Phone Resource Account properly, follow these instructions: Open the Teams Admin Center Voice Resource Accounts Add - input a name & create an Email Address, and select account type. Do NOT create a user account in the 365 Admin Center first. This will break the connection and it will not work. Once created, give it a few minutes to refresh then go to the 365 Admin Center and add "Microsoft Teams Phone Resource Account" licenses. Once licensed, go to the Teams admin center Voice Phone numbers and locate the phone number you want to assign. Make sure the Phone Number's licensed usage is "...

fred.title: Using Fireflies.ai with Invite-Only Functionality (How to Use Fred@Fireflies.ai)
fred.summary: Clients using Fireflies.ai may want to disable auto-join functionality creating the user, fred@fireflies.ai that can be invited into meetings. Here's how to use Fred.
fred.body: Content From a Fireflies.ai dashboard, you can select whether Fireflies.ai auto joins meetings or not. When toggled off, Fireflies.ai creates the user Fred@Fireflies.ai who can be invited to your meetings. To use Fred, a licensed Fireflies user must create the meeting from their mail client of choice. When Fred is invited to the meeting, this meeting will populate in the Fireflies dashboard in the bottom-right corner. Meeting name + a green switch should appear. Note that this will only occur when the meeting is set in the future. More on adding Fred to ongoing meetings later. When the green switch is on, this means Fred is primed and ready to join this meeting and will do so without further action. If for any reason you wish to remove Fred from the meeting, merely toggle the green switch...

fireflies.body: Content From a Fireflies.ai dashboard, you can select whether Fireflies.ai auto joins meetings or not. When toggled off, Fireflies.ai creates the user Fred@Fireflies.ai who can be invited to your meetings. To use Fred, a licensed Fireflies user must create the meeting from their mail client of choice. When Fred is invited to the meeting, this meeting will populate in the Fireflies dashboard in the bottom-right corner. Meeting name + a green switch should appear. Note that this will only occur when the meeting is set in the future. More on adding Fred to ongoing meetings later. When the green switch is on, this means Fred is primed and ready to join this meeting and will do so without further action. If for any reason you wish to remove Fred from the meeting, merely toggle the green switch...

**Specific to Clients:** A4CB.title: vCenter maintenance - Certificate Renewal (Every 18 months)
**Specific to Clients:** A4CB.summary: vCenter Machine SSL certificates issued by VMCA expire every 2 years. Renew proactively at the 18-month mark to avoid outages.
**Specific to Clients:** A4CB.body: vCenter Machine SSL certificates issued by VMCA expire every 2 years. Renew proactively at the 18-month mark to avoid outages. Content Steps • SSH into vCenter: ssh root@192.168.25.25 • Drop into bash shell: shell • Run the Certificate Manager: /usr/lib/vmware-vmca/bin/certificate-manager • Select Option 3 — Replace Machine SSL certificate with VMCA Certificate • Authenticate with Administrator@vsphere.local credentials • Fill in prompts: Country, Organization, Locality, IP (192.168.25.25), Hostname (vcenter.accionchicago.local) • Press Enter to accept defaults for optional fields (Email, VMCA name) • Wait 2–5 minutes for completion • Restart all services if needed: service-control --stop --all && service-control --start --all Notes • If Certificate Manager reports 'does not support vCente...

PowerShell.title: VM Script Coding Updates
PowerShell.summary: Bugs or changes required on the VMPowerShell machine to fix the client scripts.
PowerShell.body: Content In the Word Template Macro remove the display name in Distribution Lists leaving just the email address for group members. The display name sometimes breaks and returns a GUID Add Group Owner as an item when displaying the Distribution List members. Split by spaces since multiple owners can exist for a single Dist List O365 Security Group needs a description O365 Security Group Mail Enabled needs a description For Primary Services only show users that have at least one user ---

Windows Server Backup.filename: Windows Backup Fail_ Writer's Timeout Expired Between Freeze and Thaw Events.md
Windows Server Backup.title: Windows Backup Fail: Writer's Timeout Expired Between Freeze and Thaw Events
Windows Server Backup.summary: Registry fix to give Windows Server Backup more time to freeze a machine before starting a backup job.
Windows Server Backup.body: Content Increase the timeout time for VSS operations: Click on Start Run. Enter: regedit.exe. Ensure backup of registry is made, before making any changes. Find the following registry entry: HKEY LOCAL MACHINE\Software\Microsoft\Windows: NT\CurrentVersion\SPP\CreateTimeout. If the above path is not found, create it. Right-click SPP New DWORD (32 bit) Value. Name: CreateTimeout. In the Value data field, enter: 1200000. This needs to be a Decimal value. 1200000 equals 20 minutes. Reference URL: https://me.n-able.com/s/article/Error-VSS-error-0x800423f2-The-writer-s-timeout-expired-between-the-Freeze-and-Thaw-events-On-Windows-Server-2008 ---

powershell.title: Windows OS Upgrade Fails
powershell.summary: Use this guide when your Windows OS upgrade fails, or ends up on Enterprise instead of Pro.
powershell.body: Content Here's the scenario for why this is getting written up: User purchased a Windows 11 Home tablet. We traversed to Microsoft Store and purchased Windows 11 Pro upgrade. During installation, the upgrade failed and when we restarted the device, Windows was convinced we were on a "non-genuine Windows 10 Enterprise" license. Read: NO BUENO. Where was our original Windows 11 Home license? And what happened to our Windows 11 Pro upgrade? If you run Powershell with the following prompt, you'll most likely find the key you're looking for: (Get-CimInstance -ClassName SoftwareLicensingService).OA3xOriginalProductKey Save that key and let's work towards resolving the disconnect. Next, open CMD prompt (run as administrator) and type the following: slmgr /ipk VK7JG-NPHTM-C97JM-9MPGT-3V66T The abo...
